headline: Bond Traders Eye Packed Week of Rate Decisions for Sell Signals
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The world’s most important central banks will potentially hand investors fresh reasons to sell government bonds this week as policymakers find themselves forced to confront the risk of a war-driven inflation shock.Most Read from BloombergThe Billion-Barrel Hormuz Oil Shock Is About to Crash DemandGunman Detained, Trump Evacuated After Shooting at Press DinnerSergey Brin Confronted Gavin Newsom at a Treehouse Party — Then Launched a Political WarTrump Scraps US Trip for Iran Talks,
